title: Super Vulkan
body:
# Super Vulkan+
Super Vulkan+ is a Fabric-based performance modpack designed to make Minecraft run smoother, faster, and more reliably—on both client and server.
<hr>

By using Vulkan-powered rendering, this pack significantly boosts FPS, reduces stuttering, and improves world generation speed. It also enhances multiplayer performance, cuts loading times, and culls invisible entities and tiles for cleaner visuals and better CPU/GPU usage.*
<hr>

**USE IT ONLY IN THE OFFICIAL MINECRAFT LAUNCHER**
<hr>

Key features:
- Vulkan renderer for modern, high-performance graphics
- Drastically improved frame rates and reduced micro-stutters
- Optimized chunk loading and generation
- Smarter entity & block culling to reduce unnecessary rendering
- Faster startup and smoother gameplay with optimized math and logic
- Enhanced server performance for large player counts and complex worlds

Note:
> I highly recommend to turn on VSync for the best performance.

> This modpack has a high incompatibility rate with other mods, so i recommend to not change anything in the modpack unless it's compatible.
<hr>

This modpack strips away the barriers between you and a smooth, responsive Minecraft experience—no gimmicks, no visual downgrades, just pure, unobstructed performance. To make the game feel effortless. From faster chunk loading and smarter rendering to optimized server logic and Vulkan-powered graphics, Super Vulkan+ works quietly in the background so you can play the way you always wanted—fluid, stable, and beautifully intact. It’s still the same Minecraft you love. It just finally runs like it.

> *This modpack does not 100% guarantee that it lowers your CPU and GPU usage
